tables.name: channels
tables.label: Channels
tables.description: Creators and channels you follow or want to keep an eye on. Each channel tracks its topic, link, whether you're subscribed, and notes.

tables.name: videos
tables.label: Videos
tables.description: Videos you want to watch or have watched. Each video links to a channel, carries a priority and status, and tracks how it landed in your list (recommended, subscription, or manually added).
